creator: dwvcfii@gmail.com
text: Just upgraded to 11.0-RELEASE-P0 and USB is still broken.  So I suppose while the patches were applied to 10.3-releng they were not pushed forward to 11 despite that being in a pre-release state at the time.  Those patches need to go into 11 now.  USB is utterly broken for Intel NUCs in 10.3 and 11.0.
